dashboard.budgetWarning: ⚠️ You've used {{pct}}% of your monthly budget.

insights.aiSubtitle: Smart analysis of your spending patterns with personalized insights
insights.addMoreExpenses: Add more expenses to unlock your behavior profile.

savings.savedMoneyDesc: Actual total saved money from budgeted months only. This excludes potential or projected savings.
savings.addGoalTitle: Personalize your goal title and amount
savings.achieve: 🎯 What You Could Achieve With These Savings
savings.optimizedDesc: Your spending looks balanced. Continue tracking and this section will produce advanced savings actions.

predictions.basedOn: Based on moving average of recent months

budget.subtitle: Set your monthly spending limit and SmartFinance will alert you when you're approaching it.
budget.noExpensesYet: No expenses recorded yet this month.
budget.futureBudgetDesc: You've set a budget of {{amount}} for {{month}} {{year}}. No spending data available yet.

alerts.critical: Critical! {{pct}}% of your budget is gone. Only {{remaining}} remaining this month.
alerts.warning70: You've crossed 70% of your budget. Slow down spending — {{remaining}} left.
alerts.good: Great discipline! Only {{pct}}% used. You're on track to save {{remaining}} this month.
alerts.prediction: Prediction: At current pace, next month spending will be {{predicted}} — {{over}} over budget.
alerts.food: Food alone is {{pct}}% of your budget ({{amount}}). Consider cooking at home more.
alerts.noExpenses: No expenses logged in {{month}}. Your full budget is available.

emptyStates.dashboardSub: Add your first expense to see your personal financial dashboard with charts, insights, and predictions.
emptyStates.insightsSub: Start tracking your expenses and come back here to discover powerful patterns in your spending habits.
emptyStates.savingsSub: Add expenses first to generate personalized savings advice.
emptyStates.predictionsSub: Keep tracking for 2+ months and the prediction engine will forecast your future spending automatically.
emptyStates.expensesNoneSub: Tap + Add to record your first expense — no sample data here, just yours!
emptyStates.expensesNoMatchSub: Try adjusting your search or filter.
emptyStates.budgetSub: Enter a monthly budget above to unlock progress tracking, smart alerts, and savings projections. You can set budgets for current or future months.

ai.spendingIncreased: Spending increased by {{pct}}% vs last month ({{prev}} → {{curr}})
ai.spendingDecreased: Spending decreased by {{pct}}% vs last month ({{prev}} → {{curr}})
ai.dominates: {{cat}} dominates at {{pct}}% of spending ({{amount}}) - consider optimizing this category
ai.budgetAlert: Budget alert: {{pct}}% used. Only {{remaining}} remaining - slow down spending!
ai.greatControl: Great control! Only {{pct}}% of budget used. You're on track to save {{remaining}} this month
ai.setBudget: Set a monthly budget to unlock personalized savings goals and spending alerts
ai.trackMore: Track more expenses to get deeper AI insights about your spending patterns
ai.unavailable: AI analysis unavailable right now. The pattern-based insights below are still accurate.

savingsTips.reduceBudgetTipOver: You've overspent by ₹{{amount}}; reduce costs now to get back under budget.
savingsTips.reduceBudgetTipSafe: You've used {{pct}}% of budget; try trimming non-essential spending by ₹{{amount}} to stay safe.
savingsTips.targetSpendDetail: Your {{cat}} spend is {{pct}}% of this month. Aim to cut 15% and save {{saving}}/month.
savingsTips.microDetail: You average ₹{{avg}} per active day; avoid small extra spends under ₹200 to improve savings over time.
savingsTips.foodDetail: Food expenses ₹{{amount}} - consider meal prep and cheaper alternatives to save up to ₹{{saving}} per month.
savingsTips.prepareDetail: Predicted next month ₹{{predicted}} exceeds budget by ₹{{over}}. Shift 2-3 discretionary expenses to next month.
